instructionsAr: انسخ هذا الملف إلى data/learning/research-imports.json أو استخدم npm run agent:research-import
perplexityPrompts: What are the best ensemble methods for short-horizon BTC direction prediction with abstention (meta-labeling)? List strategy weight priors for trend vs mean-reversion regimes.
Summarize walk-forward validation and triple-barrier labeling for 30-60 second crypto horizons. Output JSON weightAdjustments for momentum, order_imbalance, rsi.
Market microstructure signals on Binance futures: funding rate fade, premium momentum, open interest — which combinations reduce false positives?
manusPrompts: Build a research brief: López de Prado meta-labeling applied to 17-strategy ensemble. Return JSON with weightAdjustments and minDirectionalHitTarget.
Compare Chan vs Murphy regime detection for BTC 1m. Suggest blockStrategies rules for trend_up and range regimes.

entries.notes: Replace with your actual Perplexity paste — multiply weights stack across entries.
Manus deep-research output — paste full JSON entry here.
